purpose: Row-level advisory pass over the product-talk pilot to separate product identity, source-visible commercial signals, and independent-opinion evidence value.

placement_decision.repo_role: transitional pilot mirror/receipt only; not canonical durable row storage
placement_decision.silver_home_for_admissible_observations: derived/<transcript-packet>/silver__cleaning__product_mentions/<id> or a sibling Cleaning silver lane when the record is source-visible commercial context rather than a product mention
placement_decision.gold_ready_or_computed_home_for_opinion_: bounded gold-ready/Judgment-prep assembly or consumption-time computed view with judgment_status:not_evaluated; not silver
placement_decision.do_not_promote_as_is: current rows lack full CE2/CE9 quote/timestamp admission for every row and include independent-opinion evidence value interpretation
placement_decision.boundary: product mentions and source-visible commercial signals may become silver only when quote-backed and schema-admitted; independent opinion value, downweighting, source value, credibility, sponsorship truth, and action meaning stay out of silver

field_contract.source_visible_commercial_signal: observed transcript/title/context signal only; not proof of sponsorship unless explicit source text says it

independent_opinion_evidence_tier.tier_1_commercial_positive_low_independe: commercially shaped positive; exclude or heavily down-weight for independent preference
independent_opinion_evidence_tier.tier_2_organic_positive_language: organic positive; useful for demand/promise language but lower diagnostic value than tradeoff/negative rows
independent_opinion_evidence_tier.tier_3_organic_qualified_tradeoff: organic mixed/qualified; high value for conditions, objections, and fit boundaries
independent_opinion_evidence_tier.tier_4_negative_diagnostic: organic or no-sponsor-observed negative/anti-buy; highest diagnostic value when product identity is reliable

strong_vs_good_rule: strong_endorsement requires action language, superlative/top-tier language, repeated personal-use proof, or multiple concrete benefit frames with no material caveat
positive_recommendation/good means favorable inclusion or mild praise without enough action, personal proof, or concrete benefit density
qualified_or_mixed means material praise and material caveat both affect the product read
critical_or_warning means the dominant product guidance is negative, anti-buy, disappointment, or caution

rows.author: Jeremy Fragrance
rows.title: UNIQUE BLUE, By SUPERZ: #jeremyfragrance #fragrance #cologne #perfume #parfum
rows.recommended_use_in_demand_learning: weak organic positive language only; do not overweight because transcript is very short
rows.strong_vs_good_boundary: strong because it names the product as scent of the day with a direct positive descriptor, but low-confidence because there is almost no product argument
rows.commercial_positive_handling: use according to evidence tier; do not infer sponsorship beyond observed signals
rows.rationale: Positive but thin. Useful as a weak positive mention, not as robust independent preference.

rows.title: Ultra Male For Ultra Cheap - Lattafa Ramz Silver

rows.commercial_positive_handling: use according to evidence tier; do not infer sponsorship beyond observed signals
rows.rationale: High-value qualified organic review: it names what works and what weakens the product.
